distributeEpochFees().details: Only callable by KEEPER_ROLEReads the contract's RLS balance and distributes to validators, ecosystem, and burnReturns 0 with EpochDistributionSkipped event if no RLS is available

getRoleAdmin(bytes32).details: Returns the admin role that controls `role`. See {grantRole} and {revokeRole}. To change a role's admin, use {_setRoleAdmin}.

grantRole(bytes32,address).details: Grants `role` to `account`. If `account` had not been already granted `role`, emits a {RoleGranted} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleGranted} event.

params.usdrToken_: The USDr token address (primary fee token). Pass address(0) to skip                   and configure later via setUsdrToken — required when no DEX pool exists yet.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

proxiableUUID().details: Implementation of the ERC-1822 {proxiableUUID} function. This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier.

receiveFee(address,uint256).details: Caller must have approved this contract to transfer the stablecoin

renounceRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `callerConfirmation`. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

resetPendingDistribution().details: Without this, emergencyWithdraw of RLS permanently bricks distribution      because per-category counters exceed the actual balance.

revokeRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from `account`. If `account` had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

setBurnAddress(address).details: Accepts address(0) to intentionally disable burn distribution.      Pending burn RLS will stay in pendingBurnRls until re-enabled or reset.

setConfig((uint256,uint256,uint256)).details: Only callable by DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE. BPS must sum to 10,000.

setOftBridge(address).details: Accepts address(0) to intentionally disable burn bridging.

params.zeroForOne: True if stablecoin is token0 in the pool

supportsInterface(bytes4).details: Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[ERC section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas.

swapToRls((address,uint256,uint256)).details: Only callable by KEEPER_ROLE. RLS stays in this contract for later distribution.

returns.rlsReceived: Amount of RLS received from the swap

upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes).details: Upgrade the implementation of the proxy to `newImplementation`, and subsequently execute the function call encoded in `data`. Calls {_authorizeUpgrade}. Emits an {Upgraded} event.

distributeEpochFees().notice: Distribute all RLS held by this contract to the 3 categories

dstEid().notice: Get the LayerZero destination endpoint ID

getPendingDistribution().notice: Returns the per-category pending RLS amounts awaiting distribution.

getPoolConfig(address).notice: Get the pool configuration for a stablecoin

isStablecoinSupported(address).notice: Check if a stablecoin is supported

oftBridge().notice: Get the OFT bridge contract address

pendingBalance(address).notice: Get pending balance of a stablecoin

receiveFee(address,uint256).notice: Receive ERC-20 stablecoin fees (direct transfer flow)

resetPendingDistribution().notice: Reset all pending distribution counters after an emergency RLS withdrawal.

setBurnAddress(address).notice: Set the burn destination address on Ethereum

setDstEid(uint32).notice: Set the LayerZero destination endpoint ID (e.g. Ethereum)

setOftBridge(address).notice: Set the OFT bridge contract address (LayerZero OFT adapter)

setPoolConfig(address,address,bool,addre.notice: Configure the Algebra pool for a stablecoin

setSwapLimits(uint256,uint256).notice: Set min/max swap amount bounds (in 6-decimal stablecoin units)

swapToRls((address,uint256,uint256)).notice: Swap accumulated stablecoin fees to RLS

usdrToken().notice: Get the USDr token address (primary fee token for epoch distribution)
